playlist_contract.use_case: 비 오는 밤 드라이브의 외로움을 조용한 동행과 새벽의 해소로 이동
playlist_contract.common_sound: K-pop 발라드 반주, 좁은 편곡 다이내믹, support-only 퍼커션, A3-D5 저음 중심의 일본 모던 여성 재즈 보컬 음색·프레이징
playlist_contract.variation_pool: 곡마다 실존곡 3개를 structure·harmony·emotional_arc 역할로 웹 조사해 고수준 특성만 증류; hook seed rainy-night-drive-hook-v1 균형 셔플; 각 곡의 3축 opening·groove signature는 다른 곡과 최소 2축이 다르고 실제 프롬프트에 결합됨
playlist_contract.drift_boundaries: All tracks: A3-D5, mostly A3-C#5, no high-note climax or drum crescendo. Percussion remains support-only unless explicitly confirmed. Tracks 1-9 English; Track 10 requires language confirmation before output. No jazz accompaniment, swing, walking bass, jazz comping, brushes, horns, scat, or rap verses

candidates.recurrence: two full chorus returns followed by a lyrically varied final return
candidates.entry: felt piano | two-note gaps | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: quarters | bass pickup to beat 1 | rim alternate bars
candidates.contrast_peak: the bridge changes spectral color while the voice stays below D5 and the final return keeps the same narrow loudness ceiling
candidates.transition_interlude: each pre-chorus adds harmonic color while holding drum density, loudness, and the low vocal register steady
candidates.ending: four ambient instrumental bars dissolve the piano fragments into rain

candidates.recurrence: two compact chorus returns carry the same central confession
candidates.entry: nylon guitar | broken thirds | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: straight eighths | guitar on 2-and | kick every 2 bars
candidates.contrast_peak: the second chorus is the emotional ceiling rather than a large climax
candidates.transition_interlude: verse endings thin before each direct chorus arrival
candidates.ending: an eight-bar instrumental coda releases the suspended light

candidates.recurrence: two choruses lead to a separate late refrain
candidates.entry: low synth | single-note pulses | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: half notes | synth on beat 4 | full-bar drum gaps
candidates.contrast_peak: the standalone refrain becomes the peak after a drumless bridge
candidates.transition_interlude: pre-choruses tighten the pulse and lift the inner line
candidates.ending: a short pulse-and-piano outro closes the reflected image

candidates.recurrence: two chorus statements defer the final conclusion to the coda
candidates.entry: muted guitar | offbeat knocks | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: dotted eighths | guitar on 4-and | kick alternate bars
candidates.contrast_peak: the second chorus opens into the coda instead of another peak
candidates.transition_interlude: a four-bar instrumental break separates the two narrative halves
candidates.ending: the coda states the acceptance and resolves the deceptive motion

candidates.recurrence: two restrained choruses prepare one transposed final chorus
candidates.entry: guitar harmonics | alternating dyads | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: two-beat cycle | bass before beat 3 | drums at section turns
candidates.contrast_peak: the bridge changes harmonic color before a same-register final chorus under the same loudness ceiling
candidates.transition_interlude: a short instrumental break resets the dynamic floor
candidates.ending: four bars sustain the new key after the final lyric

candidates.recurrence: three chorus arrivals are each delayed by a pre-chorus
candidates.entry: mono bass | guitar-answer pedal | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: withheld downbeat | bass on beat 2 | tom every 4 bars
candidates.contrast_peak: the bridge darkens before a third pre-chorus withholds the final downbeat
candidates.transition_interlude: pre-choruses use dominant tension as the recurring hinge
candidates.ending: a short firm close follows the final confession

candidates.recurrence: two chorus returns expand into one longer final chorus
candidates.entry: reverse guitar | paired swells | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: even eighths | fourth-bar drop | kick on Chorus beat 1
candidates.contrast_peak: the bridge suspends the pulse rather than increasing loudness
candidates.transition_interlude: chromatic bass motion connects each verse to its chorus
candidates.ending: the coda resolves the open dominant and lets the city lights fade

candidates.recurrence: two complete verse-pre-chorus-chorus cycles lead to a bridge and expanded final return
candidates.entry: analog pad | guitar-answer chord | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: half-bar pulse | bass on 3-and | kick on first Chorus bars
candidates.contrast_peak: the bridge changes harmonic color while the exact title hook stays in the same low register and loudness ceiling
candidates.transition_interlude: both pre-choruses shorten the wording and hold density before the title hook
candidates.ending: four bars hold the unresolved minor-add-nine color after the promise

candidates.recurrence: three direct chorus returns arrive without pre-choruses
candidates.entry: lead voice | pad-unison onset | vocal bar 1
candidates.groove_signature: two-bar pulse | bass on beat 3 | kick alternate Chorus bars
candidates.contrast_peak: the bridge changes perspective before the final chorus repeats the same new five-note title motif in the low register
candidates.transition_interlude: short verse endings turn directly into the chorus downbeat
candidates.ending: a four-bar coda holds the borrowed minor-subdominant after self-acceptance

candidates.recurrence: two compact hooks prepare a single full final chorus
candidates.entry: FM bell | three-note sub-synth cell | vocal bar 5
candidates.groove_signature: 3+3+2 synth cell | bass across barline | kick at section turns
candidates.contrast_peak: the only full chorus is reserved for the ending after a darker bridge
candidates.transition_interlude: each short hook returns quickly to narrative motion
candidates.ending: four quiet bars turn the parallel-minor color back toward dawn

spec.title: Voice Beyond the Wipers

prompt_fields.Vocal: Japanese modern female jazz alto A3-D5, centered A3-C#5; clear English, stable tone, clean joins, small intervals, restrained vibrato

prompt_fields.Harmony: Bm; Verse Bm-Gmaj7-D/F#-A; Pre Em7-F#7-Bm-A/C#; Chorus Gmaj7-A-F#m7-Bm, Em7-A-Dmaj7-F#7; final G-A-D

prompt_fields.Production/Mix: Centered low lead, narrow dynamics, long dark reverb, air, soft transients, stable lows

prompt_fields.Production/Mix: Centered low lead; narrow dynamics, dark wide ambience, empty sides, flat Chorus density, soft transients

locked_fingerprint.recurrence: three direct chorus returns arrive without pre-choruses
locked_fingerprint.entry: lead voice | pad-unison onset | vocal bar 1
locked_fingerprint.groove_signature: two-bar pulse | bass on beat 3 | kick alternate Chorus bars
locked_fingerprint.contrast_peak: the bridge changes perspective before the final chorus repeats the same new five-note title motif in the low register
locked_fingerprint.transition_interlude: short verse endings turn directly into the chorus downbeat
locked_fingerprint.ending: a four-bar coda holds the borrowed minor-subdominant after self-acceptance

prompt_fields.Feel: Rainy post-reception drive; solitude becomes relief
prompt_fields.Tempo/Groove: 74 BPM, 4/4; two-bar pulse | bass on beat 3 | kick alternate Chorus bars
prompt_fields.Vocal: Japanese modern female jazz alto A3-C5, mostly below Bb4; clear English, stable tone, clean joins, syllabic
prompt_fields.Instrumentation: lead voice | pad-unison onset | vocal bar 1; low bass, Verse-2 muted guitar, recessed kick

prompt_fields.Form/Flow: Voice starts bar one; 12-bar Verse, 10-bar Chorus, then 10-bar Verse and Chorus; 8-bar Bridge; 12-bar final Chorus; 4-bar Coda; each Chorus opens and closes with a new low five-note 3-3-2-1-2 motif in fixed rhythm; moderate hook prominence
prompt_fields.Production/Mix: Centered low lead; narrow dynamics, dark wide ambience, empty sides, flat Chorus density, soft transients

locked_fingerprint.recurrence: two compact hooks prepare a single full final chorus
locked_fingerprint.entry: FM bell | three-note sub-synth cell | vocal bar 5
locked_fingerprint.groove_signature: 3+3+2 synth cell | bass across barline | kick at section turns
locked_fingerprint.contrast_peak: the only full chorus is reserved for the ending after a darker bridge
locked_fingerprint.transition_interlude: each short hook returns quickly to narrative motion
locked_fingerprint.ending: four quiet bars turn the parallel-minor color back toward dawn

spec.title: 비가 멎기 전까지

prompt_fields.Feel: The last rainy miles before dawn; grief loosens and the road finally opens
prompt_fields.Tempo/Groove: 82 BPM, 4/4; 3+3+2 synth cell | bass across barline | kick at section turns
prompt_fields.Vocal: Japanese modern female jazz alto A3-D5, mostly A3-C#5; clear natural Korean, stable tone, clean phrase joins, small intervals, D5 ceiling
prompt_fields.Instrumentation: FM bell | three-note sub-synth cell | vocal bar 5; sustained guitar, warm bass, soft kick
prompt_fields.Harmony: F#; Verse F#-A#m-D#m-B; Hook B-C#-A#m-D#m; Bridge G#m-C#-F#-D#m-B-C#; final F#-C#/E#-D#m-B-Bm-F#
prompt_fields.Form/Flow: FM-bell and sub-synth entry; two verse-hook cycles; bridge turns darker; the only full chorus arrives at the end and resolves into four quiet bars; moderate hook prominence
prompt_fields.Production/Mix: Dark verses, diffuse final color under the same ceiling, soft drum transients, warm low mids, centered low lead; narrow dynamics, soft transients, steady drums

spec.exclusion_prompt: swing, walking bass, jazz comping, brushes, horns, scat, drum crescendos, notes above D5, belting
